title: County budget hearing turns heated over stalled projects
body: Legislators sparred over the implementation rate of county development projects, with several candidates weighing in on accountability measures.
aiSummary: Budget hearing dispute; candidate cited on accountability.

title: Voter registration drive gains momentum ahead of 2027
body: Civic groups report record turnout at registration desks, with local aspirants urging young voters to check their status.
aiSummary: Registration surge; aspirant urged youth turnout.

title: Water project delays spark protests in three wards
body: Residents demonstrated over delayed water infrastructure, calling on current and aspiring leaders to state their positions.
aiSummary: Infrastructure protests; leaders asked to respond.
